item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East War live updates: US President Donald Trump delays Iran power plant strike ultimatum hours before deadline
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Air Canada flight attendant thrown from plane in horror New York LaGuardia Airport crash
item.description: Chilling air traffic control audio has revealed the desperate attempts to stop the collision between the Air Canada plane and a fire truck.

item.title: Audi's new SUV will be the A8's temporary replacement as flagship
item.description: The Audi A8 looks set to march off this mortal coil soon, and its indirect replacement will be, shock horror, an SUV larger than the Q7.

item.title: Parramatta fullback Isaiah Iongi given five days to respond to breach notice from NRL integrity unit
item.description: The 22-year-old is facing a ban for ‘bringing the game into disrepute’ after a series of photos emerged.

item.title: Bossley Park motorbike crash: Two teenagers killed after mayor’s calls for bike safety at infamous intersection in Sydney’s west
item.description: The deaths of the boys, aged 14 and 15, comes amid pleas to curb riders using the restricted roadway.

item.title: Three teenagers arrested after wild 190km/h chase across Melbourne's southeast
item.description: The boy was among a group who allegedly stole an Audi and sped from cops at speeds up to 190km/h.

item.title: Dual rugby code great Wendell Sailor arrested by nine cops on drunken night out
item.description: The NRL and Wallabies legend threatened a bar manager before asking ‘do you know who I am?’

item.title: Charlie Kirk’s mentor and right-wing media trailblazer Jeff Webb killed in freak pickleball accident
item.description: The conservative activist said the US had ‘lost a future president’ after Kirk was assassinated.

item.title: 2026 ANCAP safety protocols are here: What you need to know
item.description: New, simpler safety protocols have officially come into effect designed to ensure safety systems don't distract drivers.

item.title: Suzuki could get five stars if it ‘put in the work’, says ANCAP boss
item.description: The boss of safety watchdog ANCAP says budget brands can still achieve five-star safety ratings if they truly want to.

item.title: BYD Sealion 5 still on ANCAP crash test hit list for 2026
item.description: BYD didn't submit the Sealion 5 for ANCAP crash testing in 2025, but the safety authority says the SUV remains firmly on its hit list.

item.title: Why the World's Most Welcoming Town is taxing holiday investors
item.description: The hidden cost of a Noosa holiday home - where property entry hits $2.3 million

item.title: Man dies as camping group forced to swim from sunken boat to remote Tasmanian island
item.description: Three others including a child were rescued after disaster struck their fishing trip.

item.title: AFL quickly introduces new rule to stamp out head ruffling: ‘Fake tough guy’
item.description: The league has made a significant change after a series of polarising incidents.
